title: Add Pollinations Tools Hub to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The Swiss Army Knife of the hive
gist.blurb: Someone built a whole suite of tools using our API and dropped it in the greenhouse. The Pollinations Tools Hub packs a document translator, voice studio, and Gemini chat into one neat, browser-based package.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Pollinations Tools Hub to the app showcase, featuring three browser-based AI tools powered by the API.
gist.impact: Users can now access a free, open-source suite of tools including a document translator and voice studio without any sign-ups.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy workshop or greenhouse hub representing the 'Tools Hub'. Polly the bee wearing a toolbelt, standing next to a workbench with 3 distinct glowing tools (a microphone for voice, a document/scroll for translation, and a glowing gem for Gemini).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, standing proudly at a wooden workbench in a glowing greenhouse. On the bench are three glowing items: a retro microphone, a glowing document, and a shiny gem. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, standing proudly at a wooden workbench in a glowing greenhouse. On the bench are three glowing items: a retro microphone, a glowing document, and a shiny gem. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background.
